case_title: JOHN DORSETT VS. THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF JOHN DORSETT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIM ADJUSTER WITH WITNESS ERIC GUARJARDO, DPW DISPATCHER. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLIVA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
